method: Tightened trailing stop within a time gate. Instead of a hard breakeven trigger, simply use a tighter trailing_pct during the early phase. This avoids the MFE threshold mapping problem entirely. After the time gate, reverts to normal trailing (1.3%).

candidate_summary.interpretation: If a tighter trail during early phase improves PnL locally without clipping, this provides a path-level confirmation that the QC-only early-duration benefit is real and implementable. The advantage is that this approach needs no MFE dollar mapping at all.
